title: Cobblemon Alpha Project
description: A mod that allows for naturally spawning Alpha Cobblemon in your world!
body:
# Cobblemon Alphas

A fully data-driven Alpha Pokémon ecosystem for Cobblemon 1.7.3

Cobblemon Alphas expands the wild world of Cobblemon with rare, powerful Alpha Pokémon, dynamic herd behavior, configurable spawning, and full datapack support.


### What this mod adds - Rare Alpha Pokémon with enhanced stats and behaviors - Species-specific spawning via datapacks - Optional shiny and hidden ability boosts - Underground Alpha support - Fabric and NeoForge compatibility ![An alpha charizard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0204503401f5958f49e7c7a7d1814ea90549c930_0.webp)
## Features ### Alpha Pokémon - Wild-spawned Alpha Pokémon with configurable size scaling - Improved IVs and optional hidden abilities - Tutor move mastery - Optional shiny chance increase - Fully datapack-driven per-species definitions ### Herd System Certain Alpha species may spawn with a linked group. **Following** Herd members maintain loose formation around the Alpha. **Combat Reaction** When the Alpha enters battle, herd members flee. **Regrouping** After danger passes, the herd returns and resumes formation. **Persistent Linking** Herd members permanently track their associated Alpha.
